executives.name: Danielle Brown
executives.background: Ms. Brown has served as the Chief People Officer of Gusto, Inc. since 2020. She previously served as the Chief Diversity and Inclusion Officer of Google.

executives.name: Dustan McCoy
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Brunswick Corporation. Lead Independent Director of FCX.

executives.name: Kristin Coleman
executives.background: Ms. Coleman has served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary since November 2022. Prior to joining Albemarle, she served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of US Foods Holding Corp.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: MaryAnn Wright
executives.background: Ms. Wright has served as a member of our Board since December 2021. She previously served as Group Vice President of Engineering and Product Development at Johnson Controls International plc.
